text.title: Work Breakdown Structure Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the `WBS` spec + Dictionary entry. Forbidden patterns + valid/invalid examples enforce the six core rules.

list.item: Any parent whose child `weight_pct` sum is outside [99, 101] — violates `hundred-percent-rule`.
Missing any of {Project Management, Quality Assurance, Deployment, Documentation, Training, Transition} at level 1 — violates `mandatory-overhead-branches`.
Any leaf without a matching `dictionary` entry — violates `dictionary-required`.
Any item with dates / assignees inside the `items` tree (those belong in schedule + RACI, not WBS).

example.code: { "project": "checkout-mvp", "version": "1.0", "items": [ {"id": "1", "name": "Project Management", "level": 1, "kind": "deliverable", "parent": null, "weight_pct": 12}, {"id": "1.1", "name": "Planning Documentation", "level": 2, "kind": "work_package", "parent": "1", "weight_pct": 40}, {"id": "1.2", "name": "Status Reporting", "level": 2, "kind": "work_package", "parent": "1", "weight_pct": 30}, {"id": "1.3", "name": "Risk Management", "level": 2, "kind": "work_package", "parent": "1", "weight_pct": 30}, {"id": "2", "name": "Checkout Module", "level": 1, "kind": "deliverable", "parent": null, "weight_pct": 35}, {"id": "3", "name": "Quality Assurance", "level": 1, "kind": "deliverable", "parent": null, "weight_pct": 18}, {"id": "4", "name": "Deployment", "level": 1, "kind": "deliverable", "parent": null, "weight_pct": 10}, {"id": "5", "name": "Documentation", "level": 1, "kind": "deliverable", "parent": null, "weight_pct": 9}, {"id": "6", "name": "Training", "level": 1, "kind": "deliverable", "parent": null, "weight_pct": 8}, {"id": "7", "name": "Transition", "level": 1, "kind": "deliverable", "parent": null, "weight_pct": 8} ], "dictionary": [ {"id": "1.1", "name": "Planning Documentation", "description": {"included": "Project charter, kickoff deck, communication plan", "excluded": "Detailed sprint plans"}, "deliverable": "Approved charter.md + comms-plan.md", "acceptance_criteria": ["Sponsor sign-off recorded", "Charter published to repo"], "owner": "PM", "effort_hours": 24, "dependencies": []} ] }

example.note: Verb-named nodes; only 2 of 6 mandatory overhead branches; missing PM/QA/Deployment/Documentation/Training/Transition; empty Dictionary.
